channel.title: +3 THE PRINCIPATE 30 B C -A D 192 on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +3 THE PRINCIPATE 30 B C -A D 192 on Vishvas's notes

item.title: CHRONOLOGICAL TABLE
item.description: B.C. 30: Octavian receives tribunician power for life; Horace’s 2nd book of Satires 29: Virgil’s Georgics; Horace’s Epodes 27: Octavian becomes Augustus 27-A.D. 68: JULIO-CLAUDIAN DYNASTY 27-A.D. 14: Principate of Augustus 25: Agrippa’s Pantheon; fl. Tibullus 23: First 3 books of Horace’s Odes 20: First book of Horace’s Epistles 19: Death of Virgil; fl. Propertius 18: Lex lulia de adulteriis 13: Theater of Marcellus; fourth book of Horace’s Odes 12-9:
